steps.title: Write the line equation
steps.content:
From the graph, the line passes through $(0,7)$ and $(8,0)$. Its slope is
$$\frac{0-7}{8-0}=-\frac{7}{8}$$
So the line is
$$y=-\frac{7}{8}x+7$$

steps.title: Substitute the point
steps.content:
The point $(d,4)$ lies on the line, so substitute $x=d$ and $y=4$:
$$4=-\frac{7}{8}d+7$$
$$-3=-\frac{7}{8}d$$
$$d=\frac{24}{7}$$
The answer is C.
